name.ja: <ruby>海<rt>かい</rt></ruby><ruby>中<rt>ちゅう</rt></ruby><ruby>戦<rt>せん</rt></ruby><ruby>型<rt>がた</rt></ruby>お<ruby>手<rt>て</rt></ruby><ruby>伝<rt>つだ</rt></ruby>いロボ

text.en:
2 Machine monsters
If this card is Link Summoned: You can target 1 monster your opponent controls; destroy it, also this card, then you can Special Summon 1 non-WATER Machine monster with 1600 or less ATK from your GY. If this card is banished: You can add 1 Machine monster whose ATK equals its own DEF from your Deck to your hand. You can only use each effect of "Helping Robo for Underwater Combat" once per turn, also you cannot Special Summon the turn you activate either of this card's effects, except Machine monsters.
text.zh-CN:
机械族怪兽2只
此卡名的①②效果1回合仅可各使用1次，发动此效果的回合中，自己仅可特殊召唤机械族怪兽。①：此卡连接召唤的情况下，以对手场上的1只怪兽为对象可以发动。将该怪兽及此卡破坏。然后，可从自己墓地将除水属性怪兽以外的、1只攻击力1600以下的机械族怪兽特殊召唤。②：此卡被除外的情况下可以发动。从牌组将1只攻击力和守备力的数值相同的机械族怪兽加入手牌。
